design_philosophy: A high-contrast, data-dense command center interface. Optimized for 1920x1080 display on a Raspberry Pi TV monitor. Focus on scannability, critical alert visibility, and futuristic 'Cyberpunk/Terminal' aesthetics. Avoids distracting graphics in favor of glowing data points and strict grid alignments.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, rigid hierarchy). grid-cols-12 system.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight padding inside widgets (p-4 or p-6) to maximize data density. Generous gap (gap-6) between major dashboard modules.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Terminal Retro-Futurism: Flat or slightly transparent background (bg-black/60), crisp 1px borders (border-cyan-500/20), NO soft drop shadows. Use CSS drop-shadow on text and lines for 'neon glow' instead of box-shadow.

motion_and_interactions.map_lines: Use framer-motion to animate SVG line paths (stroke-dasharray/stroke-dashoffset) connecting map locations.
motion_and_interactions.critical_alerts: Fast pulsing opacity animation for critical alerts (e.g., animate-pulse).
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should increase border opacity and text brightness on hover.

component_instructions.global_wrapper: Set a fixed resolution wrapper or use h-screen w-screen to ensure it locks to 1920x1080. Add the dark tactical grid texture as a very low-opacity background image.
component_instructions.header: Top bar taking full width. Left: Company/NOC Logo or Name. Center: Live ticking digital clock (HH:MM:SS format in JetBrains Mono). Right: Global System Status Indicator.
component_instructions.map_widget: Use `react-simple-maps` with a custom US TopoJSON URL (e.g., `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/us-atlas@3/states-10m.json`). Filter to only show MI, OH, IN. Place glowing SVG markers at Remus MI, Ovid MI, Mt. Pleasant MI, Constantine MI, Novi MI, Canton OH (Plant/Warehouse), Middlebury IN. Connect them with glowing SVG <Line> elements.
component_instructions.vendor_status: List of glowing badges/cards for CrowdStrike, NinjaOne, Zscaler, O365/D365. Use 'nominal' color for UP, 'critical' for DOWN.
component_instructions.wug_alerts: Scrolling or fixed list of recent WUG email alerts. Severity dictates color (Yellow/Red).
component_instructions.dia_circuits: Compact data table using JetBrains Mono for IPs/Status from HP Aruba.
component_instructions.tickets: Vivantio ticket queue showing Open, In Progress, Critical ticket counts.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="map-node-remus"`, `data-testid="status-zscaler"`).

images.description: Dark tactical grid texture to be used as a global background with opacity-10 and blend-overlay.

icons.usage: Use crisp, minimalist icons. Avoid filled icons; stick to 1.5px or 2px stroke width.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text over the dark background. Neon colors must only be used as accents or on text sizes > 18px to pass APCA contrast guidelines.
